subject: Armin Arlert (Attack on Titan) — young humanoid with short bowl-cut hair and wide blue eyes, expressing worry or distress
description: Close-up portrait of a young anime-style figure with a short bowl-cut hairstyle and wide blue eyes. The expression is one of visible concern or alarm — mouth slightly open, brows raised. The figure wears what appears to be a dark jacket or uniform. Behind them, a partly cloudy blue sky fills the background with warm light at the edges. The overall feel is tense and reactive, consistent with a moment of shocked realization.
foreground: young short-haired figure in dark uniform, looking forward with wide alarmed eyes
background: partly cloudy sky with warm-lit edges
emotion: alarmed, wide-eyed concern; mouth parted as if mid-utterance
